summary: 3 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.announcement: Sequel to 'Young Washington' greenlit following the original film's $20M+ opening record at the box office.

film.title: Basic Instinct
film.announcement: Writer Joe Eszterhas provides update on the reboot with original character Catherine Tramell returning.

film.title: Untitled Harvey Keitel Project
film.announcement: Harvey Keitel is shooting a film written by his wife Daphna Kastner.

tv.title: Murciélago
tv.announcement: Manga adaptation greenlit for 2027 TV anime series on HIDIVE.
